positive: Synthwave aesthetic illustration: A neon-lit grid landscape with a stylized sunset, featuring a silhouette of a palm tree and a retro sports car. Vibrant magenta, electric blue, and cyan colors dominate the scene. Vector art style, 80s vaporwave, highly geometric, vaporwave poster art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural lighting, organic shapes
